subcodes.first_line: He is the Herald between earth and heaven, and He is the One manifest through the Most Great Name in the world. I beseech Thee, O [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو المنادی بین الارض و السماء و هو الظاهر بالاسم الاعظم فی العالم اسئل بک یا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Greatest Name
